en: David again gathered all the chosen men of Israel, thirty thousand.
zh: 大衛又聚集以色列中所有揀選出來的三萬人。

en: And David arose and went with all the people who were with him from Baale-judah to bring up from there the ark of God, which is called by the name of the LORD of hosts who sits enthroned on the cherubim.
zh: 大衛和與他在一起的眾人起程前去，要從巴拉．猶大把 神的約櫃運來，這約櫃的名稱是以坐在二基路伯之上萬軍之耶和華的名字而起的。

en: And they carried the ark of God on a new cart and brought it out of the house of Abinadab, which was on the hill. And Uzzah and Ahio, the sons of Abinadab, were driving the new cart,
zh: 他們把 神的約櫃從山岡上亞比拿達的家裡抬出來，安放在一輛新車上；亞比拿達的兩個兒子，烏撒和亞希約趕著這輛新車，

en: with the ark of God, and Ahio went before the ark.
zh: 車上有 神的約櫃 。亞希約走在約櫃的前面。

en: And David and all the house of Israel were making merry before the LORD, with songs and lyres and harps and tambourines and castanets and cymbals.
zh: 大衛和以色列全家在耶和華面前用各種松木製造的樂器，就是用琴、瑟、鼓、鈸、鑼，作樂跳舞。

en: And when they came to the threshing floor of Nacon, Uzzah put out his hand to the ark of God and took hold of it, for the oxen stumbled.
zh: 他們到了拿艮的打禾場的時候，因為牛幾乎絆倒，烏撒就伸手扶住 神的約櫃。

en: And the anger of the LORD was kindled against Uzzah, and God struck him down there because of his error, and he died there beside the ark of God.
zh: 耶和華的怒氣向烏撒發作； 神因這錯誤的舉動，就當場擊殺他，他就死在 神的約櫃旁邊。

en: And David was angry because the LORD had burst forth against Uzzah. And that place is called Perez-uzzah, to this day.
zh: 大衛因為耶和華擊殺了烏撒，就很生氣，因此稱那地方為毘列斯．烏撒，直到今日。

en: And David was afraid of the LORD that day, and he said, "How can the ark of the LORD come to me?"
zh: 那一天，大衛懼怕耶和華，說：“耶和華的約櫃怎可以到我這裡來呢？”

en: So David was not willing to take the ark of the LORD into the city of David. But David took it aside to the house of Obed-edom the Gittite.
zh: 於是大衛不肯把耶和華的約櫃運進大衛的城到他那裡去，卻轉運到迦特人俄別．以東的家裡去。

en: And the ark of the LORD remained in the house of Obed-edom the Gittite three months, and the LORD blessed Obed-edom and all his household.
zh: 耶和華的約櫃在迦特人俄別．以東的家停留了三個月，耶和華賜福給俄別．以東和他的全家。

en: And it was told King David, "The LORD has blessed the household of Obed-edom and all that belongs to him, because of the ark of God." So David went and brought up the ark of God from the house of Obed-edom to the city of David with rejoicing.
zh: 有人告訴大衛王：“耶和華因為 神的約櫃的緣故，賜福給俄別．以東的家和一切屬他的。”大衛就去，歡歡喜喜把 神的約櫃從俄別．以東的家中抬上大衛的城裡去。

en: And when those who bore the ark of the LORD had gone six steps, he sacrificed an ox and a fattened animal.
zh: 那些抬耶和華的約櫃的人走了六步，大衛就獻一頭公牛和一隻肥畜為祭。

en: And David danced before the LORD with all his might. And David was wearing a linen ephod.
zh: 大衛束著細麻布的以弗得，在耶和華面前極力跳舞。

en: So David and all the house of Israel brought up the ark of the LORD with shouting and with the sound of the horn.
zh: 這樣，大衛和以色列全家，以歡呼和角聲，把耶和華的約櫃抬了上來。

en: As the ark of the LORD came into the city of David, Michal the daughter of Saul looked out of the window and saw King David leaping and dancing before the LORD, and she despised him in her heart.
zh: 耶和華的約櫃運進大衛城的時候，掃羅的女兒米甲從窗戶往外觀看，看見大衛王在耶和華面前跳躍舞蹈，心裡就鄙視他。

en: And they brought in the ark of the LORD and set it in its place, inside the tent that David had pitched for it. And David offered burnt offerings and peace offerings before the LORD.
zh: 他們把耶和華的約櫃抬進去，安放在帳棚裡它自己的地方，就是安放在大衛給它支搭的帳棚裡，大衛就在耶和華面前獻上燔祭和平安祭。

en: And when David had finished offering the burnt offerings and the peace offerings, he blessed the people in the name of the LORD of hosts
zh: 大衛獻完了燔祭和平安祭，就奉萬軍之耶和華的名給人民祝福。

en: and distributed among all the people, the whole multitude of Israel, both men and women, a cake of bread, a portion of meat, and a cake of raisins to each one. Then all the people departed, each to his house.
zh: 又分給眾人，就是分給以色列全體群眾，無論男女，每人一個餅、一個棗餅、一個葡萄乾餅；然後眾人就各歸各家去了。

en: And David returned to bless his household. But Michal the daughter of Saul came out to meet David and said, "How the king of Israel honored himself today, uncovering himself today before the eyes of his servants' female servants, as one of the vulgar fellows shamelessly uncovers himself!"
zh: 大衛回去要給自己的家人祝福。掃羅的女兒米甲出來迎見大衛，說：“以色列王今天多麼榮耀啊！他今天竟在眾臣僕的婢女眼前，赤身露體，就像一個卑賤的人無恥地露體一樣。”

en: And David said to Michal, "It was before the LORD, who chose me above your father and above all his house, to appoint me as prince over Israel, the people of the LORD- and I will make merry before the LORD.
zh: 大衛對米甲說：“我是在耶和華面前跳舞 ；耶和華揀選了我，使我高過你父親和他的全家，立我作耶和華的子民以色列的領袖，所以我要在耶和華面前跳舞作樂。

en: I will make myself yet more contemptible than this, and I will be abased in your eyes. But by the female servants of whom you have spoken, by them I shall be held in honor."
zh: 我還要比今天這樣更卑賤，我要自視卑微 。至於你所說的那些婢女，她們倒要尊重我。”

en: And Michal the daughter of Saul had no child to the day of her death.
zh: 掃羅的女兒米甲，一直到她死的日子，都沒有生育。
